raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Farmworkers are the backbone of California’s nation-leading agricultural industry.",
    "Farmworkers play a critical role in ensuring the stability of the state, nation, and world’s food supply.",
    "Investing in farmworkers' well-being is investing in California’s success.",
    "Assembly Bill 2240 requires the Department of Housing and Community Development to submit a report analyzing the feasibility and impact of transitioning housing units at Office of Migrant Services (OMS) centers to year-round availability.",
    "Assembly Bill 2240 eliminates eligibility requirements that prevent farmworkers and their families from accessing housing.",
    "Assembly Bill 3035 expands site eligibility for agricultural employee housing developments in Santa Clara and Santa Cruz counties.",
    "Assembly Bill 3035 increases the number of housing units for agricultural employees from 36 to 150.",
    "Assembly Bill 3035 streamlines the development process for housing located within 15 miles of designated agricultural areas."
  ]
}
```
